import jax
import jax.numpy as jnp

def compute_reward(state, action, next_state):
    BALL, PYRAMID, HEX = 3, 5, 11
    BLUE, GREEN, YELLOW = 3, 2, 5

    H, W = next_state.grid.shape[:2]
    ys = jnp.arange(H)
    xs = jnp.arange(W)
    yy, xx = jnp.meshgrid(ys, xs, indexing='ij')
    max_dist = jnp.float32(H + W)

    prev_pos = state.agent.position.astype(jnp.float32)
    next_pos = next_state.agent.position.astype(jnp.float32)

    # Pocket states
    prev_holding_green = (state.agent.pocket[0] == BALL) & (state.agent.pocket[1] == GREEN)
    next_holding_green = (next_state.agent.pocket[0] == BALL) & (next_state.agent.pocket[1] == GREEN)
    prev_empty = (state.agent.pocket[0] == 0)
    next_empty = (next_state.agent.pocket[0] == 0)

    pickup_event = prev_empty & next_holding_green
    putdown_event = prev_holding_green & next_empty

    # Blue pyramid location from state (before pickup removes it)
    bp_mask_s = (state.grid[:, :, 0] == PYRAMID) & (state.grid[:, :, 1] == BLUE)
    bp_count_s = jnp.sum(bp_mask_s)
    bp_y = jnp.sum(yy * bp_mask_s) / jnp.maximum(bp_count_s, 1)
    bp_x = jnp.sum(xx * bp_mask_s) / jnp.maximum(bp_count_s, 1)

    # Yellow hex location - use both states for robustness
    yh_mask_ns = (next_state.grid[:, :, 0] == HEX) & (next_state.grid[:, :, 1] == YELLOW)
    yh_mask_s = (state.grid[:, :, 0] == HEX) & (state.grid[:, :, 1] == YELLOW)
    yh_count_ns = jnp.sum(yh_mask_ns)
    yh_count_s = jnp.sum(yh_mask_s)
    yh_y_ns = jnp.sum(yy * yh_mask_ns) / jnp.maximum(yh_count_ns, 1)
    yh_x_ns = jnp.sum(xx * yh_mask_ns) / jnp.maximum(yh_count_ns, 1)
    yh_y_s = jnp.sum(yy * yh_mask_s) / jnp.maximum(yh_count_s, 1)
    yh_x_s = jnp.sum(xx * yh_mask_s) / jnp.maximum(yh_count_s, 1)
    hex_y = jnp.where(yh_count_ns > 0, yh_y_ns, yh_y_s)
    hex_x = jnp.where(yh_count_ns > 0, yh_x_ns, yh_x_s)
    hex_exists = (yh_count_ns > 0) | (yh_count_s > 0)

    # Phase 1: approach blue pyramid
    prev_dist_bp = jnp.abs(prev_pos[0] - bp_y) + jnp.abs(prev_pos[1] - bp_x)
    next_dist_bp = jnp.abs(next_pos[0] - bp_y) + jnp.abs(next_pos[1] - bp_x)
    delta_bp = (prev_dist_bp - next_dist_bp) / max_dist

    # Phase 2: approach yellow hex while holding
    prev_dist_yh = jnp.abs(prev_pos[0] - hex_y) + jnp.abs(prev_pos[1] - hex_x)
    next_dist_yh = jnp.abs(next_pos[0] - hex_y) + jnp.abs(next_pos[1] - hex_x)
    delta_yh = (prev_dist_yh - next_dist_yh) / max_dist

    # Green ball on grid check (after putdown)
    green_ball_mask_ns = (next_state.grid[:, :, 0] == BALL) & (next_state.grid[:, :, 1] == GREEN)
    gb_count_ns = jnp.sum(green_ball_mask_ns)
    gb_y_ns = jnp.sum(yy * green_ball_mask_ns) / jnp.maximum(gb_count_ns, 1)
    gb_x_ns = jnp.sum(xx * green_ball_mask_ns) / jnp.maximum(gb_count_ns, 1)
    dist_gb_hex = jnp.abs(gb_y_ns - hex_y) + jnp.abs(gb_x_ns - hex_x)

    # Task success: green ball placed adjacent to yellow hex
    task_success_ns = (gb_count_ns > 0) & hex_exists & (dist_gb_hex <= 1.5)

    # Previous state task success check
    green_ball_mask_s = (state.grid[:, :, 0] == BALL) & (state.grid[:, :, 1] == GREEN)
    gb_count_s = jnp.sum(green_ball_mask_s)
    gb_y_s = jnp.sum(yy * green_ball_mask_s) / jnp.maximum(gb_count_s, 1)
    gb_x_s = jnp.sum(xx * green_ball_mask_s) / jnp.maximum(gb_count_s, 1)
    dist_gb_hex_s = jnp.abs(gb_y_s - hex_y) + jnp.abs(gb_x_s - hex_x)
    task_success_s = (gb_count_s > 0) & hex_exists & (dist_gb_hex_s <= 1.5)

    just_succeeded = task_success_ns & ~task_success_s

    # Agent next to hex while holding (to encourage putdown near hex)
    next_adj_hex = (next_dist_yh <= 1.5) & hex_exists & next_holding_green
    prev_adj_hex = (prev_dist_yh <= 1.5) & hex_exists & prev_holding_green
    just_adj_hex = next_adj_hex & ~prev_adj_hex

    r = jnp.float32(0.0)

    # Phase 1: strong shaping toward blue pyramid
    r = r + jnp.where(
        ~prev_holding_green & (bp_count_s > 0),
        delta_bp * jnp.float32(2.0),
        jnp.float32(0.0)
    )

    # Large pickup milestone
    r = r + jnp.where(pickup_event, jnp.float32(5.0), jnp.float32(0.0))

    # Phase 2: strong shaping toward yellow hex while holding green ball
    r = r + jnp.where(
        prev_holding_green & hex_exists,
        delta_yh * jnp.float32(2.0),
        jnp.float32(0.0)
    )

    # Bonus for first time adjacent to hex while holding
    r = r + jnp.where(just_adj_hex, jnp.float32(3.0), jnp.float32(0.0))

    # Good putdown: placed while adjacent to hex
    good_putdown = putdown_event & (prev_dist_yh <= 2.0) & hex_exists
    r = r + jnp.where(good_putdown, jnp.float32(5.0), jnp.float32(0.0))

    # Bad putdown penalty
    bad_putdown = putdown_event & (prev_dist_yh > 2.0)
    r = r + jnp.where(bad_putdown, jnp.float32(-3.0), jnp.float32(0.0))

    # One-time task completion bonus (large)
    r = r + jnp.where(just_succeeded, jnp.float32(20.0), jnp.float32(0.0))

    return r.astype(jnp.float32)
